title: Create: Retweaked Controller
description: A collection of Resource Packs that change the accents of the Tweaked Controller and Linked Controller to Brass or Andesite Alloy.
body:
# Retweaked Controller
![The project's Logo, featuring a Tweaked controller with a mix of the Brassed Controller, Rebrassed Controller, and Alloyed Controller Resource Packs applied](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58922f07802ef6d7e28e4e04ab071a34431f337c.png)

### A collection of Resource packs for [Create: Tweaked Controllers](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tweaked-controllers/) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), that change the blue accents on the Linked Controller and Tweaked Controller and its GUI to Brass or Andesite Alloy.
Requires Create or Create Fabric, and Create: Tweaked Controllers

Issues? E-mail them to: thetaeco@gmail.com
